series_description: This series consists of records of contacts with specific clients i.e., requests for services, actions taken, services provided, outcomes achieved, and other supporting documentation. Refer to Code of Virginia, §§ 51.5-39.1 through 12.
retention_statement: Retain 5 years after case closure appeal deadline, then destroy in compliance with No. 8 on schedule cover page.

series_description: This series consists of critical incident reports not included in Client Case Records. Series includes reports and agency response, if any. Refer to Code of Virginia, §§ 51.5-39.1 through 12.
retention_statement: Retain 5 years after receipt of report, then destroy in compliance with No. 8 on schedule cover page.
